headline: CES 2026 showcases robotaxi and autonomous vehicle innovations
summary: Uber announced alliance with Lucid and Nuro leveraging Nvidia Alpamayo platform to deploy production-intent robotaxis

headline: Zoox receives federal approval to deploy robotaxis
summary: NHTSA exemption granted for purpose-built robotaxis without steering wheels or brake pedals. Production facility in California with goal of manufacturing up to 10,000 vehicles annually.

headline: Prof. Amnon Shashua at CES 2026: Robotaxi updates, breakthroughs in AI, and robotics
summary: MOIA aims to deploy over 100,000 self-driving vehicles by 2033 based on Mobileye's self-driving system. Initial U.S. deployments planned for 2026 followed by broader rollouts in Europe using ID. Buzz platform with Volkswagen and Mobileye Drive Level 4 autonomous driving

headline: Europe’s first industrially produced roboshuttle with Mobileye technology enters pre-series production
summary: Pre-series production of autonomous ID. Buzz with Mobileye technology started at VW Hanover plant. Around 500 vehicles planned for various projects in Europe and USA. Series production scheduled for 2027.

headline: Zoox and Uber announce strategic partnership for Las Vegas robotaxi deployment
summary: Zoox purpose-built robotaxis will be available on Uber app in Las Vegas starting summer 2026, with LA expansion by mid-2027

headline: Uber and Motional launch commercial robotaxi service in Las Vegas
summary: Commercial IONIQ 5 robotaxi service launched on Uber with safety operator; driverless operations targeted by year-end

headline: NVIDIA to launch L4 software-driven robotaxis on Uber across 28 cities by 2028
summary: Partnership using DRIVE Hyperion platform and Alpamayo AI model; LA and SF deployments starting H1 2027

headline: Uber and Rivian partner to deploy up to 50000 fully autonomous robotaxis
summary: $1.25B investment through 2031; 10,000-50,000 autonomous R2 robotaxis; SF and Miami initial markets in 2028

headline: WeRide reports record FY2025 revenue of RMB 684.6 million up 90% YoY
summary: Record annual revenue with Slovakia entry as 4th European market; 2000 Robotaxi GXRs with Geely Farizon

headline: XPeng establishes Robotaxi Business Unit targeting driverless L4 operations in 2027
summary: Formal robotaxi unit created; Amap partnership for booking; three vehicle models planned under 200K CNY; H2 2026 demos

headline: Zoox expands testing to Phoenix Dallas Austin and Miami with purpose-built robotaxis
summary: Purpose-built robotaxis begin testing in four new cities; SF area quadrupled; LV doubled; paid rides pending NHTSA approval

headline: Pony.ai reports first quarterly profit with 160% robotaxi revenue growth
summary: First-ever profit of $75.5M in Q4 2025; fleet at 1446 vehicles; targeting 3000 robotaxis in 20+ cities by year-end

headline: Waymo hits 500000 weekly paid rides milestone across 10 US cities
summary: Tenfold increase from 50K in May 2024; 3067 vehicles; 4M+ autonomous miles weekly; targeting 1M rides/week by year-end

headline: WeRide and Uber launch fully driverless robotaxi fare-charging operations in Dubai
summary: First fully driverless commercial robotaxi in Middle East; over 200 vehicles deployed across UAE; Tawasul fleet operator

headline: Waymo starts robotaxi services at San Antonio International Airport
summary: Fourth airport service added with curbside drop-offs and ride-share pickups

headline: Apollo Go launches fully driverless commercial ride-hailing in Dubai
summary: First international Apollo Go app deployment; Dubai Taxi Company partner; 50 vehicles scaling to 1000+; Bolt integration planned

headline: WeRide and Grab launch Singapore's first autonomous public ride service in Punggol
summary: Ai.R autonomous ride service with 11 vehicles; Southeast Asia's first autonomous public ride service

headline: Waymo launches 11th US city Nashville with Lyft fleet partnership
summary: 60 sq mi initial area covering Broadway and downtown; Flexdrive handles fleet management; Lyft app integration coming later

headline: Pony.ai launches Europe's first commercial robotaxi service in Zagreb with Verne
summary: BAIC Arcfox Alpha T5 vehicles with 7th-gen system; ~90 km² area; 7am-9pm daily via Verne app; Uber integration planned

headline: VW MOIA America begins autonomous ID. Buzz testing in Los Angeles ahead of Uber launch
summary: ~10 vehicles scaling to 100+; commercial rides on Uber planned late 2026; VW ADMT rebranded to MOIA America

headline: Uber and Nuro begin testing premium robotaxi service in San Francisco
summary: Employee test rides using Lucid Gravity SUVs with Nuro L4 system; public launch planned late 2026

headline: Waymo begins autonomous driving testing in London with 100 vehicle fleet
summary: Autonomous testing with safety specialists; ~100 Jaguar I-PACE vehicles; 100 sq mi area; Moove fleet partner; commercial launch late 2026

headline: Didi announces UAE as first overseas robotaxi market
summary: Testing planned for later in 2026; UAE becomes three-way battleground with WeRide and Apollo Go

headline: Waymo opens Miami and Orlando to public with no waitlist and adds highway service
summary: 150K+ riders served since January; Miami highway service on I-95 and Dolphin Expressway; ~100 sq mi Miami coverage

headline: Wayve raises $60M extension from Qualcomm AMD and Arm
summary: Series D extension brings total to ~$1.5B at $8.6B valuation; London robotaxi via Uber planned for 2026

headline: Uber and Lucid expand robotaxi partnership to 35000 vehicles with $750M investment
summary: Uber adds $200M bringing total to $500M; Saudi PIF affiliate Ayar invests $550M; commercial launch in SF Bay Area late 2026

headline: Glydways raises $170M Series C for autonomous transit pilots in UAE New York and Atlanta
summary: Co-led by Suzuki ACS Group and Khosla Ventures; total raised over $250M; Atlanta pilot launches December 2026 with free on-demand service

headline: Autonomous vehicle funding tripled in Q1 2026 to record $21.4B across 34 deals
summary: 262% jump from all of 2025; Waymo $16B Series D at $126B valuation; Shield AI $2B Series G; Wayve $1.3B Series D at $8.6B valuation

headline: Norway grants first permit for fully driverless autonomous bus operations
summary: Karsan e-ATAK with ADASTEC software and Applied Autonomy xFlow fleet management; transition from supervised to driverless without safety driver

headline: Tesla launches fully unsupervised robotaxi service in Dallas and Houston
summary: First Tesla robotaxi launches without safety monitor phase; Dallas ~30-35 sq mi; Houston ~12-15 sq mi; early ride $6.15 for 2.25 miles ~56% cheaper than Waymo

headline: Tesla targets 7 robotaxi cities by June 2026 after Texas expansion
summary: Austin Dallas Houston now live; Phoenix Miami Orlando Tampa Las Vegas next; Cybercab mass production expected late April

headline: Counterpoint Research forecasts robotaxi market to reach $168B by 2035
summary: Global fleet to hit 3.6M vehicles by 2035; China leads deployment volume US leads innovation; Waymo Apollo Go Tesla WeRide Pony.ai named top 5

headline: Geely announces China's first purpose-built native robotaxi prototype Eva Cab
summary: Built on Geely L4 AI architecture with World Action Model; CaoCao to commercialize; mass production 2027; first directly Geely-developed robotaxi vs converted production models

headline: Tesla Q1 2026 earnings - paid Robotaxi miles nearly doubled QoQ but 5-city expansion delayed
summary: Q1 paid Robotaxi miles nearly doubled sequentially; Austin geofence expanded; Dallas/Houston launched in April; FSD approved Netherlands; Phoenix, Miami, Orlando, Tampa, Las Vegas pushed from 1H 2026 to preparations underway

headline: Tesla Robotaxi launch pushed back in 5 US cities per Q1 earnings update
summary: Phoenix Miami Orlando Tampa Las Vegas now listed as preparations underway instead of 1H 2026; Musk claims dozen states by year-end but track record of missed promises raises skepticism

headline: WeRide and Lenovo target 200000 autonomous vehicle global rollout over 5 years
summary: Announced at Auto China 2026; HPC 3.0 platform with NVIDIA DRIVE AGX Thor delivers 2000+ TOPS; 50% lower autonomous suite costs and 84% lower TCO vs previous generation

headline: Geely Eva Cab debuts at Auto China 2026 - China's first purpose-built robotaxi
summary: Built on Geely L4 AI architecture; worlds first 2160-line digital LiDAR with 25.92M points/sec and 600m range; CaoCao customized version 2027 mass production; targets 100K robotaxis by 2030

headline: MOIA America and Beep partner to deploy 5000 autonomous ID. Buzz vehicles in US
summary: 10-year deal targeting cities municipalities and transit agencies; validation testing in Lake Nona FL; Mobileye self-driving system; passenger rides later 2026

headline: Pony.ai unveils next-gen NVIDIA DRIVE Hyperion compute platform with 4000 TOPS
summary: New domain controller with NVIDIA NVLink for multi-chip configurations; targets 20 cities and 3000 vehicles by year-end 2026; 500% Fangzai shipment increase

headline: QCraft unveils Physical AI Model and 500+ TOPS QPilot MAX at Auto China 2026
summary: World Model + Reinforcement Learning architecture; deployed in 25 production models with 50 more expected in 2026; vehicles undergoing road testing in Munich and Paris

headline: Tesla Robotaxi app launches for Android users on Google Play
summary: Service previously iOS-only; expansion to hundreds of millions of Android users; supports scaling ride volume and FSD data collection

headline: Hertz launches Oro Mobility to manage Uber autonomous robotaxi fleet of Lucid vehicles
summary: New Hertz affiliate provides charging maintenance repairs cleaning and depot staffing; Bay Area launch later 2026; explore expansion 2027; Lucid robotaxi fleet with Nuro AV tech

headline: Aurora and Hirschbach sign MOU for 500 Aurora Driver-powered trucks
summary: Non-binding MOU outlining path to 500 trucks delivered starting 2027; Driver-as-a-Service model; revenue stream in hundreds of millions of dollars; 500 million driverless miles

headline: Tesla unsupervised Robotaxi fleet grows to 25 total vehicles across 3 Texas cities
summary: Austin 19 Dallas 3 Houston 3; First real fleet growth signs after months of stagnation; far below Musk predictions; Waymo operates 3000 vehicles across 10 cities for context

headline: Uber commits 200M more to Lucid bringing total to 500M and minimum 35000 robotaxi fleet
summary: Original 20K Gravity SUV commitment expanded to 10K Gravity + 25K mid-size platform vehicles; Uber 11.5% ownership stake; Nuro AV tech across all fleet

headline: Aurora and Volvo Autonomous Solutions launch 200-mile Dallas-Oklahoma City autonomous freight route
summary: 5 days/week supervised autonomy; final validation phase for driverless; Volvo VNL Autonomous with Aurora Driver; direct customer facility hauls reduce drayage

headline: Lyft VP publishes Under the Hood article positioning company as AV operations backbone for industry
summary: Highlights 15K Flexdrive vehicles, 550M miles/year, 3M AV training miles, 157K hours data, 50M annual riders, 95% road coverage via FleetView, 2.5M OSM edits in 2025, 44K+ vehicles managed

headline: Nuro receives CPUC Drivered Pilot Permit ahead of Uber Lucid robotaxi service launch
summary: CA DMV modified driverless AV permit to include Lucid Gravity vehicles; one of only 5 companies with both DMV Driverless Testing and CPUC Drivered Pilot permits

headline: Aurora McLane fully driverless Dallas-Houston freight service launches for Berkshire Hathaway subsidiary
summary: 280K autonomous miles and 1400 deliveries in pilot; targeting 200+ driverless trucks by year-end across Sun Belt; human observer remains in cab per Paccar agreement

headline: Kodiak AI starts autonomous freight hauling with Roehl Transport between Dallas and Houston
summary: 4 round trips/week launched in April 2026; 23500 hours of paid driverless ops in Q1; targeting long-haul driverless operations by end of 2026; Kodiak operates in 5 Texas/OK cities

headline: Waymo expands total coverage to 1400+ sq mi across 11 cities for FIFA World Cup readiness
summary: Miami expansion first then Austin Atlanta Houston SF Bay Area in coming weeks; 200M+ autonomous miles; targeting 1M paid rides/week by year-end; 3000 robotaxis in operation

headline: Waymo Houston service area expanding to EaDo Texas Medical Center and Northeast Houston
summary: Tens of thousands of riders on service in Houston; expansion to NRG Stadium area for FIFA World Cup; current 25 sq mi growing significantly

headline: Waymo expands coverage more than 20 percent crossing Rhode Island sized footprint
summary: Up from 1100 to 1400+ sq mi across 11 cities; expanding in existing cities rather than rushing new ones; unit economics working; Waymo on track for 1M rides/week
